title: The Perpetual Curate
author: Margaret Oliphant
description: « The Perpetual Curate » by Margaret Oliphant is a classic Victorian novel that offers a nuanced portrait of church life and the challenges faced by English clergy in the 19th century. The story revolves around Frank Wentworth, the young perpetual curate of Carlingford, a fictional small town where religious and social tensions simmer beneath the surface.
